news.paragraph: Coinbase is seeing several recent analyst price target adjustments, with Mizuho and President Capital raising their targets while maintaining neutral and buy ratings. Although H.C. Wainwright lowered its price target, the firm maintained its buy rating on the stock. There are no immediate earnings or regulatory catalysts mentioned in the current news cycle.
headlines: Is Trending Stock Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) a Buy Now?
BNB Reclaims $660, These AI and Meme Coins Went Vertical
H.C. Wainwright Cuts Price Target on Coinbase Global (COIN) But Maintains Buy Rating
